heading: Reserves: discharge upon becoming ordained minister of religion
label: 12682 Reserves: discharge upon becoming ordained minister of religion
text: Under regulations to be prescribed by the Secretary of Defense, a Reserve who becomes a regular or ordained minister of religion is entitled upon his request to a discharge from his reserve enlistment or appointment.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 1162(b) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1662(i)(2)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
